channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.description: On the seventh day of Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial, the Senate impeachment court is set to decide whether to grant prosecutors' request to subpoena her financial records. The debate...

item.title: UK Launched Powerball Lottery Offers Massive Jackpots and New Prize Tiers
item.description: The UK version of the world's largest jackpot game, Powerball, is set to launch this week. Operator Allwyn announced that players can purchase tickets for £4 per line starting Tuesday, with the first ...

item.title: Teacher union calls for broader probe into education department corruption allegations

item.title: Saskatchewan Roughriders' Captain Jayden Dalke Dies in Car Crash; Team Mourns Loss
item.description: The Saskatchewan Roughriders are in mourning after team captain and linebacker Jayden Dalke died in a car crash on Saturday evening. The team described Dalke as a 'relentless warrior' on the field, hi...

item.description: The United States and Iran are on the brink of a full-scale conflict, with recent attacks escalating tensions between the two nations. According to military reports, at least three U.S. service member...

item.title: A haunting exploration of guilt and redemption through verse
item.description: Night Swimming by Sharon Kernot is a groundbreaking novel that merges the intensity of crime fiction with the lyrical depth of poetry. The story follows January Clare Colson, a woman plagued by insomn...

item.title: Choirmaster Jailed for Rape and Impregnating Teenage Girl During Deliverance Session
item.description: A state high court in Ogidi, Anambra State, has convicted and sentenced a choirmaster, James Onuorah, to 25 years’ imprisonment for raping and impregnating a 16-year-old girl during a deliverance sess...

item.title: TSC Implements New Salary Structure for Teachers in Kenya
item.description: The article discusses the Kenyan Teachers Service Commission (TSC) rolling out a new salary structure for public sector teachers, effective from July 1, 2026. The changes aim to address disparities in...

item.title: Argentina and Spain Clash in FIFA World Cup 2026 Final as Messi Seeks Legacy
item.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 final will see Lionel Messi's Argentina face Spain in a high-stakes encounter at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey. This match marks the culmination of the first 48-team tournament...

item.title: 20th Anniversary of Unsolved Edmonton Murder Still Lingers
item.description: The article commemorates the 20th anniversary of Nadine Robinson's unsolved murder in Edmonton, highlighting the ongoing search for justice. Robinson, a 14-year-old girl, was abducted and killed in 20...

item.title: Bauchi Governor Proposes Integration of Arabic Education into National Curriculum
item.description: Bauchi State Governor, Bala Mohammed, has proposed integrating Arabic education more formally into Nigeria's national curriculum, sparking debates over educational equity and religious implications. T...

item.title: Blue Bombers edge Redblacks 36-34 in thrilling overtime finish
item.description: In a closely contested CFL matchup, the Winnipeg Blue Bombers secured a dramatic 36-34 overtime victory over the winless Ottawa Redblacks. Quarterback Dru Brown led the comeback for Winnipeg, culminat...
